languages.text:
Maximum hit chance for melee attacks, burst shots and attacks and effects that "always hit" are 100%. For ranged attacks this chance is 95%.
Modifiers lowering this chance will affect even "always hit" attacks, forcing them to perform a to-hit roll anyway.

traits.locale_text:
Maximum hit chance for melee attacks, burst shots and attacks and effects that "always hit" are 100%. For ranged attacks this chance is 95%.
Modifiers lowering this chance will affect even "always hit" attacks, forcing them to perform a to-hit roll anyway.

languages.text:
Attacks that always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} (such as {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Penalties{/g} that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.
languages.original_text:
Maximum hit chance for melee attacks, burst shots and attacks and effects that "always hit" are 100%. For ranged attacks this chance is 95%.
Modifiers lowering this chance will affect even "always hit" attacks, forcing them to perform a to-hit roll anyway.

traits.locale_text:
Attacks that always hit (such as melee attacks or burst shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
Penalties that reduce the maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, and the roll to hit is still made.

Attacks that always hit (such as melee attacks or burst shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
Penalties that reduce the maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, and the roll to hit is still made.

Attacks that always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} (such as {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Penalties{/g} that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.

Attacks that always hit (such as melee attacks or burst shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
Penalties that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.

Attacks that always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} (such as {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Penalties{/g} that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.

languages.text:
Атаки, которые всегда {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g} (например, {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}атаки в ближнем бою{/g} или выстрелы {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}очередью{/g}), имеют максимальный шанс попадания 100%. Прочие дистанционные атаки имеют максимальный шанс попадания 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Штрафы{/g}, снижающие максимальный шанс попадания, также применяются к атакам, которые всегда попадают, из-за чего бросок на попадание все равно выполняется.

{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Штрафы{/g}, снижающие максимальный шанс попадания, также применяются к атакам, которые всегда попадают, из-за чего бросок на попадание все равно выполняется.

Атаки, которые всегда {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g} (например, {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}атаки в ближнем бою{/g} или выстрелы {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}очередью{/g}), имеют максимальный шанс попадания 100%. Прочие дистанционные атаки имеют максимальный шанс попадания 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Штрафы{/g}, снижающие максимальный шанс попадания, также применяются к атакам, которые всегда попадают, из-за чего бросок на попадание все равно выполняется.

languages.text:
Los ataques que {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impactan{/g} siempre (como los {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataques cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} o los disparos en {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}ráfaga{/g}) tienen una probabilidad de impacto máxima del 100 %. Los demás ataques a distancia tienen una probabilidad de impacto máxima del 95 %.
Las {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalizaciones{/g} que reducen la probabilidad de impacto máxima también se aplican a los ataques que impactan siempre, haciendo así que la tirada de impacto se realice igualmente.

Attacks that always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} (such as {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Penalties{/g} that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.

traits.locale_text:
Los ataques que {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impactan{/g} siempre (como los {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataques cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} o los disparos en {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}ráfaga{/g}) tienen una probabilidad de impacto máxima del 100 %. Los demás ataques a distancia tienen una probabilidad de impacto máxima del 95 %.
Las {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalizaciones{/g} que reducen la probabilidad de impacto máxima también se aplican a los ataques que impactan siempre, haciendo así que la tirada de impacto se realice igualmente.

languages.text:
Angriffe, die immer {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}treffen{/g} (wie {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriffe{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}Salvenschüsse{/g}) haben 100 % maximale Trefferchance. Andere Fernkampfangriffe haben eine maximale Trefferchance von 95 %.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Abzüge{/g}, die die maximale Trefferchance reduzieren, gelten auch für Angriffe, die immer treffen. Es ist also auch für diese ein Trefferwurf erforderlich.

Attacks that always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} (such as {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Penalties{/g} that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.

traits.locale_text:
Angriffe, die immer {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}treffen{/g} (wie {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriffe{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}Salven{/g}schüsse) haben 100 % maximale Trefferchance. Andere Fernkampfangriffe haben eine maximale Trefferchance von 95 %.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Abzüge{/g}, die die maximale Trefferchance reduzieren, gelten auch für Angriffe, die immer treffen. Es ist also auch für diese ein Trefferwurf erforderlich.

languages.text:
Her zaman {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vuran{/g} saldırılar ({g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırıları{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}seri{/g} atışlar gibi), %100 maksimum vuruş olasılığına sahiptir. Diğer menzilli saldırıların maksimum vuruş olasılığı ise %95'tir.
Maksimum vuruş olasılığını azaltan {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}ceza puanları{/g}, her zaman vuran saldırılara da uygulanır. Bu durumda vuruş zarı yine de atılır.
languages.original_text:
Attacks that always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} (such as {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Penalties{/g} that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.

traits.locale_text:
Her zaman {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vuran{/g} saldırılar ({g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırıları{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}seri{/g} atışlar gibi), %100 maksimum vuruş olasılığına sahiptir. Diğer menzilli saldırıların maksimum vuruş olasılığı ise %95'tir.
Maksimum vuruş olasılığını azaltan {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}ceza puanları{/g}, her zaman vuran saldırılara da uygulanır. Bu durumda vuruş zarı yine de atılır.

languages.text:
Les attaques qui {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touchent{/g} toujours leur cible (comme les {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaques de mêlée{/g} ou les tirs {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}en rafale{/g}) ont 100 % de chances maximum de toucher. Les autres attaques à distance ont 95 % de chances maximum de toucher.
Les {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}pénalités{/g} qui réduisent les chances maximum de toucher s'appliquant également aux attaques qui font mouche systématiquement, le jet de dés correspondant doit être réalisé quand même.
languages.original_text:
Attacks that always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} (such as {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Penalties{/g} that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.

traits.locale_text:
Les attaques qui {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touchent{/g} toujours leur cible (comme les {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaques de mêlée{/g} ou les tirs {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}en rafale{/g}) ont 100 % de chances maximum de toucher. Les autres attaques à distance ont 95 % de chances maximum de toucher.
Les {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}pénalités{/g} qui réduisent les chances maximum de toucher s'appliquant également aux attaques qui font mouche systématiquement, le jet de dés correspondant doit être réalisé quand même.

languages.text:
必定{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}的攻击（如{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}连发{/g}射击）拥有100%的最大命中率。其他远程攻击的最大命中率为95%。
降低最大命中率的{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}减值{/g}同样适用于必定命中的攻击，从而导致其仍需进行命中检定。
languages.original_text:
Attacks that always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} (such as {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Penalties{/g} that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.

traits.locale_text:
必定{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}的攻击（如{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}连发{/g}射击）拥有100%的最大命中率。其他远程攻击的最大命中率为95%。
降低最大命中率的{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}减值{/g}同样适用于必定命中的攻击，从而导致其仍需进行命中检定。

languages.text:
必ず当たる攻撃（{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接攻撃{/g}や{g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}バースト{/g}ショットなど）は最大100%の{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}率を持つ。他の遠距離攻撃は最大95%の命中率を持つ。
最大命中率を下げる{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}ペナルティ{/g}も、必ず当たる攻撃にも適用されるため、命中判定は行われる。
languages.original_text:
Attacks that always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} (such as {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} shots) have a 100% maximum hit chance. Other ranged attacks have a maximum hit chance of 95%.
{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Penalties{/g} that reduce maximum hit chance also apply to attacks that always hit, causing the hit roll to still be made.

traits.locale_text:
必ず当たる攻撃（{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接攻撃{/g}や{g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}バースト{/g}ショットなど）は最大100%の{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}率を持つ。他の遠距離攻撃は最大95%の命中率を持つ。
最大命中率を下げる{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}ペナルティ{/g}も、必ず当たる攻撃にも適用されるため、命中判定は行われる。
